overrides.override_summary: General release may not be required under CA Corp Code §31512 and CA Bus & Prof Code §20010
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchisees cannot be forced to waive franchise law rights upon renewal/transfer

overrides.override_summary: Post-term noncompete may not be enforceable under California law
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchisees may be free to operate competing businesses immediately after termination

overrides.override_summary: Arbitration in MN and MN forum selection may not be enforceable
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchisees may be able to litigate/arbitrate in California

overrides.override_summary: Waiver of punitive damages and jury trial may not be enforceable
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchisees retain access to punitive damages and jury trials

overrides.override_summary: Illinois Franchise Disclosure Act provisions supersede inconsistent agreement terms
overrides.why_it_matters: IL law protections apply regardless of MN choice of law

overrides.override_summary: General release upon renewal/transfer does not apply to Maryland Franchise Law claims
overrides.why_it_matters: MD franchisees retain right to sue under MD franchise law even after signing release

overrides.override_summary: Franchisee may sue in Maryland for claims arising under Maryland Franchise Registration and Disclosure Law
overrides.why_it_matters: MD franchisees can litigate MD law claims in home state

overrides.override_summary: Termination for bankruptcy may not be enforceable under US Bankruptcy Act
overrides.why_it_matters: Bankruptcy filing alone may not justify termination for MD franchisees

overrides.override_summary: Surety bond required by Maryland Securities Division to secure pre-opening obligations
overrides.why_it_matters: Additional protection for MD franchisees' pre-opening payments

overrides.override_summary: Termination only for good cause; must provide 30-day written notice and cure opportunity
overrides.why_it_matters: MI franchisees get stronger termination protections

overrides.override_summary: Franchisor cannot refuse renewal without fair market value compensation (if term <5 years and franchisee prohibited from continuing under different brand)
overrides.why_it_matters: MI franchisees entitled to FMV compensation on non-renewal

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require arbitration or litigation outside Michigan
overrides.why_it_matters: MI franchisees can arbitrate/litigate in Michigan

overrides.override_summary: Cannot refuse transfer except for good cause (enumerated)
overrides.why_it_matters: MI franchisees have stronger transfer rights

overrides.override_summary: Minnesota Franchise Act provisions may supersede agreement terms
overrides.why_it_matters: Additional MN franchise law protections apply

overrides.override_summary: North Dakota Century Code franchise provisions supersede inconsistent terms
overrides.why_it_matters: ND franchise law protections apply

overrides.override_summary: Washington Franchise Investment Protection Act prevails in conflicts
overrides.why_it_matters: WA law supersedes MN choice-of-law

overrides.override_summary: Arbitration/mediation must be in Washington or mutually agreed location
overrides.why_it_matters: WA franchisees can resolve disputes locally

overrides.override_summary: Release void except in negotiated post-agreement settlements with independent counsel per RCW 19.100.220(2)
overrides.why_it_matters: WA franchisees retain franchise law rights through renewal/transfer

overrides.override_summary: Transfer fees collectable only to extent they reflect franchisor's reasonable estimated or actual costs
overrides.why_it_matters: WA may limit the $9,999/$25,000 transfer fees to actual costs

overrides.override_summary: Franchisee may terminate under any grounds permitted by state law; buy-back at less than FMV may be voidable within 2 years of signing
overrides.why_it_matters: WA franchisees have expanded termination rights and asset protection

overrides.override_summary: Surety bond required due to SFG's lack of operating history
overrides.why_it_matters: Additional WA franchisee protection for pre-opening obligations

overrides.override_summary: Virginia franchise law provisions supersede inconsistent terms
overrides.why_it_matters: VA franchise law protections apply

overrides.override_summary: Rhode Island franchise law provisions apply
overrides.why_it_matters: RI franchise law protections apply
